title: Aureline extension registry-manifest, mirror-continuity, channel-promotion, offline-bundle, and local-archive-import vocabulary (ADR seed)
description: Seed boundary schema for the extension artifact transport, registry / mirror, channel-promotion, offline-bundle, and local-archive-import rows reserved for the registry-mirror, install / update review, permission-inspector, offline-bundle, and support-export lanes. This is an ADR-seed schema: the vocabulary and field set are pinned so public registry, approved mirror, private registry, offline bundle, local archive, and quarantined local copy surfaces share one trust, compatibility, and anti-abuse vocabulary instead of minting registry-specific badges. Extends the ADR-0012 registry_source_class, mirror-continuity, and publisher-continuity vocabularies; never widens the ADR-0012 effective-permission or publisher-trust ceilings. Adding a new member to any enumerated set or an additive field is additive-minor with a registry_manifest_schema_version bump; repurposing an existing member is breaking and requires a new decision row. Raw artifact bytes, raw signing-key material, raw attestation-bundle bytes, raw policy-bundle bytes, raw mirror-cache bodies, raw offline-bundle payload bytes, and raw local-archive bytes MUST NOT appear in any record; records carry refs only.

registry_manifest_schema_version.description: Integer schema version for this registry-manifest vocabulary export. Current value is 1. Bumped only on breaking payload changes; additive-optional fields do not bump this version.

record_kind.description: Discriminator for the concrete payload shape. Every record carries exactly one kind.

opaque_id.description: Opaque, stable id safe to log, safe on RPC, safe in manifests / journal entries / support bundles / claim manifests.

monotonic_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp produced from a monotonic clock source.

extension_identity.description: Namespaced extension id of the form 'publisher_id/extension_id' (ADR-0012). Never reused after retirement.

semver_string.description: SemVer string the registry manifest was published against. Pinning and floors are policy-pack concerns; this field carries the declared value only.

digest_algorithm.description: Frozen digest-algorithm vocabulary. A registry / mirror / offline bundle / local archive that re-digests under a different algorithm MUST preserve the original digest as-is; content-address identity is algorithm-tagged.

digest_hex.description: Lowercase hex digest of the artifact bytes. The content-address is the (algorithm, digest_hex) pair. Mirror, offline-bundle, and local-archive rows MUST quote this pair verbatim; repackaging that would alter it is denied with artifact_identity_mutated_on_repackage.

digest_size_bytes.description: Optional size in bytes of the digested artifact. Preserved across mirrors and offline bundles; used by restore previews to surface expected-size mismatches.

content_address.description: Content-address pair binding an artifact to its bytes. Identity is preserved verbatim across public registry, approved mirror, private registry, offline bundle, and local archive rows.

registry_source_class.description: Where the registry manifest was delivered from. This seed narrows the ADR-0012 registry_source_class vocabulary: 'mirror' is refined into 'approved_mirror'; 'vendored_local' is refined into 'local_archive' and 'quarantined_local_copy'. The ADR-0012 vocabulary remains the parent; any row here that is also rendered against the ADR-0012 schema MAY project 'approved_mirror' onto 'mirror', 'local_archive' onto 'vendored_local', and 'quarantined_local_copy' onto 'vendored_local' with an explicit quarantine marker.

channel_class.description: Frozen channel-lane vocabulary for registry / mirror / offline-bundle rows. A row starts in 'quarantine'; review promotes it to 'approved'; general availability promotes it to 'production'. Promotion never re-encodes the artifact; only the channel row advances. A row that re-digests the artifact during promotion is denied with artifact_identity_mutated_on_repackage.

approval_state_class.description: Frozen approval-state vocabulary. Every registry-manifest row carries exactly one approval_state_class; a transition records an audit event and a channel_promotion_row.

signature_class.description: Frozen signature-class vocabulary. An approved_mirror / private_registry / offline_bundle / local_archive row MAY NOT upgrade an unsigned_requires_out_of_band_verification artifact to publisher_signature or dual_signed_publisher_and_attestation; widening the signature class is denied with artifact_identity_mutated_on_repackage.

trust_claim_source.description: Which transport supplied the trust claim for the row. The install-review and permission-inspector surfaces render this value as an explicit provenance chip; silent fallback to 'verified_publisher' when the source is approved_mirror_cache / offline_bundle / local_archive / quarantined_local_copy is forbidden.

trust_badge_inheritance_rule.description: How the row's rendered publisher-trust tier relates to the origin publisher-continuity tier. 'inherits_origin_tier' is reserved for public_registry and for approved_mirror rows that re-verify the origin signature with a fresh revocation snapshot. Everything else caps the rendered tier; 'quarantined_cannot_inherit' forces the rendered tier to unverified_publisher regardless of origin.

compatibility_claim_class.description: Frozen compatibility-claim vocabulary shared by public_registry, approved_mirror, private_registry, offline_bundle, and local_archive rows. The concrete declared-target set rides the ADR-0012 host_contract_family / ADR-0019 capability-world vocabularies; this field is the summary class.

revocation_snapshot_age_class.description: Freshness class for the publisher-continuity / signature revocation snapshot the row was evaluated against. Offline-bundle and approved-mirror restores MUST surface this value; a restore against a 'stale' or 'unverified_no_snapshot' snapshot denies with offline_bundle_restore_refused_revocation_snapshot_stale unless the operator records an out-of-band attestation.

lockfile_parity_state.description: Parity state between the offline bundle's lockfile and the importer's resolved dependency set. 'drift_detected_blocking' denies restore with offline_bundle_restore_refused_lockfile_drift; additive_rebuild_allowed lets the importer add artifacts that the bundle did not ship but does not admit downgrading any pinned row.

mirror_continuity_state_class.description: Mirror-continuity state class. 'narrowing_attempted_widening' is a terminal rejection: a mirror that tried to relax the origin's trust or signature posture is denied with mirror_narrowing_attempted_widening.

anti_abuse_signal_class.description: Frozen anti-abuse signal vocabulary shared by registry, mirror, and offline-bundle rows. A surface that hides a raised anti-abuse signal is denied with review_disclosure_incomplete; the signal never promotes or demotes the publisher-continuity row on its own.

offline_bundle_restore_step_class.description: Frozen restore-preview step-class vocabulary. The importer MUST render one step per artifact in the bundle; a restore surface that hides a 'block_on_*' step is denied with review_disclosure_incomplete.

registry_audit_event_id.description: Frozen registry / mirror / offline-bundle audit-event-id vocabulary. Additive-minor. Raw artifact bytes, raw signing-key material, raw attestation bytes, and raw mirror-cache bodies MUST NOT appear on any event.

registry_denial_reason.description: Frozen registry / mirror / offline-bundle denial-reason vocabulary. Silent downgrade to a generic 'unavailable' or 'install blocked' chip is forbidden; every denial emits the corresponding audit event with a typed reason and a repair affordance label.

redaction_class.description: Declared redaction class for the record when emitted to an observable sink. Mirrors the ADR-0007 redaction defaults; raw attestation-bundle bytes, raw signature bodies, raw mirror-cache bytes, and raw offline-bundle payload bytes MUST NOT appear on any sink regardless of redaction class.

declared_host_contract_family_refs.description: Refs to the ADR-0012 host_contract_family bindings the row claims compatibility with.

declared_capability_world_refs.description: Reserved ADR-0019 capability-world identities the row claims compatibility with.

compatibility_bridge_profile_ref.description: Ref to the ADR-0019 compatibility-bridge profile when compatibility_claim_class = compatibility_bridge_required. Null otherwise.

known_caveat_labels.description: Human-legible caveats rendered on review surfaces. Raw secret material forbidden.

compatibility_notes_entry.description: Compatibility-claim row shared by registry / mirror / offline-bundle rows.

source_ref.description: Ref to the row that raised the signal (publisher-continuity row, mirror-continuity row, or policy-pack constraint row). Raw detector bodies never carried here.

signal_label.description: Human-legible label for the signal; never a raw user or publisher secret.

extension_manifest_ref.description: Ref to the ADR-0012 extension_manifest_row the registry-manifest row describes. Must resolve to the same extension_identity / extension_version pair.

artifact_digest_ref.description: Redundant ref to the ADR-0012 artifact_digest_ref record. Carried alongside content_address so tooling that already indexes the ADR-0012 digest row keeps its joins.

signature_ref.description: Ref to the publisher signature, attestation bundle, or dual-signed envelope. Raw signing-key material, raw attestation-bundle bytes, and raw signature bodies never cross this boundary.

attestation_bundle_ref.description: Ref to a transparency-log / attestation-bundle record when signature_class = attestation_bundle or dual_signed_publisher_and_attestation. Null otherwise.

publisher_continuity_ref.description: Ref to the ADR-0012 publisher_continuity_row for the publisher that signed the artifact.

source_endpoint_ref.description: Opaque ref to the delivering endpoint (public-registry endpoint record, approved-mirror endpoint record, private-registry endpoint record, offline-bundle id, local-archive import id, or quarantined-local-copy id). Never a raw URL string.

compatibility_notes.description: At least one compatibility-claim entry. A row with no compatibility notes is non-conforming; honesty demands a compatibility_unknown_pending_reverification claim over an empty list.

mirror_provenance_ref.description: Ref to the mirror_continuity_row when registry_source_class = approved_mirror. Null for public_registry, private_registry, offline_bundle, local_archive, and quarantined_local_copy rows.

offline_bundle_ref.description: Ref to the offline_bundle_manifest_row when registry_source_class = offline_bundle. Null otherwise.

local_archive_ref.description: Ref to the local_archive_import_row when registry_source_class = local_archive or quarantined_local_copy. Null otherwise.

revocation_snapshot_ref.description: Ref to the revocation / trust snapshot the row was evaluated against. Raw snapshot bytes never carried.

anti_abuse_signals.description: Raised anti-abuse signals. A surface that hides these is denied with review_disclosure_incomplete.

policy_pack_applicable_refs.description: Refs to ADR-0012 policy_pack_constraint_row rows whose scope covers this registry-manifest row.

allOf.description: mirror_provenance_ref MUST be non-null when registry_source_class = approved_mirror.
offline_bundle_ref MUST be non-null when registry_source_class = offline_bundle.
local_archive_ref MUST be non-null when registry_source_class = local_archive or quarantined_local_copy.
quarantined_local_copy rows MUST carry trust_badge_inheritance_rule = quarantined_cannot_inherit; they cannot be rendered with any publisher trust tier other than unverified_publisher.
local_archive rows MUST cap trust inheritance at capped_at_unverified_on_local_archive or quarantined_cannot_inherit; a local archive never inherits the origin tier.

approved_mirror rows MUST cap trust inheritance at capped_at_community_on_approved_mirror, inherits_origin_tier, or quarantined_cannot_inherit; the mirror may only inherit the origin tier when it re-verified the origin signature with a fresh revocation snapshot (the surface enforces; this schema pins the allowed vocabulary).
private_registry rows MUST cap trust inheritance at capped_at_organisational_on_private_registry, inherits_origin_tier, or quarantined_cannot_inherit.
attestation_bundle_ref MUST be non-null when signature_class = attestation_bundle or dual_signed_publisher_and_attestation.

mirror_endpoint_ref.description: Ref to the mirror endpoint record. Raw URLs never carried here.

origin_registry_ref.description: Ref to the origin (public or private) registry endpoint record.

origin_signature_ref.description: Ref to the origin signature / attestation record. The mirror MUST NOT re-sign the artifact; it quotes the origin signature verbatim.

mirror_cached_content_address.description: Content-address of the mirror's cached copy. MUST equal origin_content_address (algorithm and digest_hex); any divergence emits mirror_continuity_state_class = broken_digest_mismatch.

narrowings_applied.description: Policy-pack narrowings the mirror applied over the origin set. Narrowing only; widening is denied with mirror_narrowing_attempted_widening.

allOf.description: mirror_cached_content_address MUST be non-null when mirror_continuity_state_class is verified_live, verified_cached, or stale_cached.

subject_manifest_row_ref.description: Ref to the registry_manifest_row under promotion.

subject_content_address.description: Content-address of the subject artifact. The same pair MUST appear on the registry_manifest_row for the source channel and the target channel; a promotion that re-digests denies with artifact_identity_mutated_on_repackage.

subject_signature_ref.description: Ref to the origin signature / attestation record. Promotion MUST NOT re-sign; the same signature_ref appears on both channels.

preserves_artifact_identity.description: Pinned const. A channel promotion that would re-encode the artifact is denied with artifact_identity_mutated_on_repackage; the row cannot advance otherwise.

required_evidence_refs.description: Evidence refs cited by the promotion review (compatibility reports, security review, approval tickets). Raw review bodies never carried.

approvers_ref.description: Refs to approver decision rows (ADR-0010 / governance_packet).

repair_affordance_label.description: Human-legible repair affordance rendered when promotion_outcome is a 'blocked_*' or 'revoked_*' class.

allOf.description: Promotions only advance the lane order: quarantine → approved → production. Reverse moves must be expressed as approval_state_class transitions (revoked, emergency_disabled), not as channel_promotion_row records.
repair_affordance_label MUST be non-empty when promotion_outcome is a blocked_* or revoked_after_promotion class.

publisher_continuity_snapshot_ref.description: Ref to the publisher-continuity row snapshot taken at export time. The bundle carries the snapshot so a restore can compare it against the importer's current publisher-continuity state.

origin_registry_source_class.description: Where the artifact was pulled from when the bundle was built. Offline bundles built from a local_archive or quarantined_local_copy source are not admitted; the source MUST have been either a public registry, an approved mirror, or a private registry.

dependency_closure_refs.description: Refs to other offline_bundle_artifact_entry rows in the same bundle that this artifact depends on.

step_index.description: Zero-based step index in the deterministic restore order. Importers render previews in this order; a surface that reorders denies with review_disclosure_incomplete.

rendered_label.description: Human-legible label rendered on the restore preview surface.

repair_affordance_label.description: Human-legible repair affordance rendered when step_class is a 'block_on_*' class or a 'prompt_*' class.

allOf.description: repair_affordance_label MUST be non-empty on block_on_* and prompt_* steps.

exported_by_ref.description: Ref to the exporter identity row (admin decision / automation actor). Raw user identity never carried.

bundle_content_address.description: Content-address of the sealed bundle envelope. A restore that cannot reproduce this address denies with registry_digest_mismatch.

artifacts.description: Ordered list of artifact entries the bundle ships. Order defines the deterministic restore preview index.

dependency_closure_complete.description: True when every artifact entry in the bundle has every dependency_closure_refs target resolvable within the bundle. A false value MUST be mirrored by a block_on_missing_dependency step in deterministic_restore_preview.

lockfile_ref.description: Ref to the lockfile snapshot the bundle carries. Raw lockfile bytes never embedded.

deterministic_restore_preview.description: Ordered restore-preview steps. Importers render this list verbatim; reordering or hiding steps denies with review_disclosure_incomplete.

trust_claim_source.description: Pinned to 'offline_bundle' for this record kind; carried here so parity consumers can read one field across record kinds.

trust_badge_inheritance_rule.description: Inheritance rule for artifacts restored from this bundle. A bundle MAY declare 'inherits_origin_tier' only when every artifact entry carries a non-stale revocation snapshot and the importer re-verifies origin signatures; otherwise 'capped_at_community_on_approved_mirror' or stricter.

allOf.description: trust_claim_source on an offline_bundle_manifest_row MUST be offline_bundle.
A bundle that declares lockfile_parity_state = drift_detected_blocking MUST include at least one block_on_lockfile_drift step in deterministic_restore_preview.
A bundle whose revocation_snapshot_age_class is stale or unverified_no_snapshot MUST include at least one block_on_revocation_snapshot_stale step in deterministic_restore_preview.

imported_by_ref.description: Ref to the importer identity row. Raw user identity / filesystem path never carried; the path class rides imported_from_path_class.

imported_from_path_class.description: Frozen path-class vocabulary. Raw filesystem path never carried here; only the class.

publisher_continuity_snapshot_ref.description: Ref to a publisher-continuity snapshot if the archive carried one. Null when the archive was imported with no continuity provenance.

trust_claim_source.description: Pinned to 'local_archive' or 'quarantined_local_copy' on this record kind.

trust_badge_inheritance_rule.description: Pinned to capped_at_unverified_on_local_archive or quarantined_cannot_inherit on this record kind; a local archive NEVER inherits a verified / organisational / community tier.

user_attestation_label.description: Human-legible label capturing the importer's attestation (e.g. 'downloaded from vendor support portal 2026-04-19'). Raw secret material forbidden.

quarantined.description: True when the import was recorded as a quarantined local copy (trust_claim_source = quarantined_local_copy). A quarantined row does not admit install; the install-review surface renders quarantined_local_copy_install_denied.

allOf.description: trust_claim_source on a local_archive_import_row MUST be local_archive or quarantined_local_copy.
trust_badge_inheritance_rule on a local_archive_import_row MUST be capped_at_unverified_on_local_archive or quarantined_cannot_inherit.
quarantined = true MUST co-occur with trust_claim_source = quarantined_local_copy and trust_badge_inheritance_rule = quarantined_cannot_inherit.
quarantined = false MUST co-occur with trust_claim_source = local_archive.
